# Scene Contract: CH001_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the discovery of a massive gold-bearing quartz vein in the Arizona hills to trigger the inciting incident. The scene must transition from the physical exhaustion of prospecting to the high-stakes planning of a claim defense and resource acquisition.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- james_k_powell

## Required Environments
- arizona_quartz_vein_location

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical appearance of the gold vein (size, color, texture)
- Specific tools/gear used by the prospectors during labor

## Beat List
- BT001: Hard labor and prospecting
- BT002: The discovery of the gold vein
- BT003: Euphoria and strategic planning

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the presence of an unseen horror through the visceral terror and chaotic flight of a group of Apache warriors. The scene must transition from controlled movement to primal panic, utilizing the verticality of the rocky gorge to facilitate a high-stakes accident.

## Required Cast
- apache_warriors (Group)

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_nightscape (Cave Entrance / Rocky Gorge)

## Continuity Constraints
- Starlight lighting consistency across all shots
- Precise synchronization of moaning sound with character reaction beats

## Beat List
- BT001: Warriors approach the cave entrance with curiosity/bravery.
- BT002: Unnatural moaning sound triggers terror.
- BT003: Panic and flight leads to a fall.

purpose: The climax of the protagonist's internal struggle.
summary: At midnight, amidst rustling and moaning sounds, the protagonist engages in a massive psychological and physical battle of will to overcome the paralysis caused by the gas.
production_intent: A high-intensity psychological and physical struggle where the protagonist fights gas-induced paralysis through sheer willpower. The scene relies on extreme close-ups to convey internal agony and external physiological strain against a backdrop of auditory hallucinations/noises.
scene_short_description: A naked, physically fit fighter struggles against paralysis inside a dark mountain cave.

# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
A high-intensity psychological and physical struggle where the protagonist fights gas-induced paralysis through sheer willpower. The scene relies on extreme close-ups to convey internal agony and external physiological strain against a backdrop of auditory hallucinations/noises.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter, naked, extremely fit)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave (dark, rocky floor, midnight)

## Continuity Constraints
- Progression of facial muscle strain and physical exhaustion
- Lighting shifts corresponding to midnight passage

## Beat List
- BT001: Paralysis and despair amidst moaning sounds
- BT002: Physical battle against the gas
- BT003: Mental breakthrough and willpower

# Scene Contract: CH005_SC004

## Production Intent
A high-velocity chase sequence where the protagonist utilizes superhuman agility to escape a predatory threat. The sequence must emphasize the physical scale of the environment and the extreme speed of the beast's charge through kinetic camera movement and slow-motion emphasis on the vertical leap.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter, superhuman agility)
- the_watch_dog (predatory beast)

- deserted_martian_cityscape (street)
- building exterior (wall with window at 30ft)

## Continuity Constraints
- Speed of the_watch_dog charge must remain consistent across tracking shots.
- The vertical height of the window must be visually established as 30 feet.
- Direction of movement must maintain a linear path from street to building wall.

## Beat List
- BT001: The calm breaks as the predator lunges.
- BT002: High-speed pursuit and terror.
- BT003: The superhuman evasion (30ft leap).

## Production Intent
Establish the aftermath of conflict through quietude and character reflection. The scene transitions from the tension of Tars Tarkas's concession to a contemplative state where the protagonist acknowledges his dual emotional bonds with Sola and the Watch-thing.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- sola
- tars_tarkas
- watch_thing

## Required Environments
- martian_interior_chamber

## Continuity Constraints
- Post-battle physical state (bruises, dirt)
- Protagonist nudity/metamorphosis status

## Beat List
- BT001: Tars Tarkas concedes the beast to the protagonist
- BT002: The aftermath of the concession settles into silence
- BT003: Protagonist reflects on his dual existence (Sola vs Watch-thing)

# Scene Contract: CH007_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the pitiless and communal biological cycle of Mars through a ritualized capture event. The scene must emphasize that Martian upbringing is a collective social function rather than a parental one, using the frantic energy of the hatchlings to drive the tension.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- sola
- Newly Hatched Martians (3-4ft tall)
- Martian women/youths

## Required Environments
- the_incubator_enclosure (walled enclosure with egg clusters and gauntlet path)

## Continuity Constraints
- Hatchling height must remain consistent at 3 to 4 feet.
- The movement of the Martian women/youths must follow a specific ritualized gauntlet pattern.

## Beat List
- BT001: The cracking of the eggs (Anticipation)
- BT002: The emergence of the hatchlings (Transition to Intensity)
- BT003: The ritualized capture gauntlet (Clinical/Ritualistic Intensity)

# Scene Contract: CH008_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the ruthless efficiency of the Martian looters through a systematic stripping of a damaged vessel, transitioning from the tension of an approaching craft to the somber realization of loss.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- green_martian_warriors
- woola

- deserted_martian_city_plaza
- city outskirts

## Continuity Constraints
- Intensity and color of fire on the vessel
- Volume of debris/loot being moved from the craft

## Beat List
- BT001: Vessel approaches the city outskirts
- BT002: Systematic looting of the craft
- BT003: The vessel is set ablaze
- BT004: Protagonist observes the aftermath

purpose: To introduce a new character type and create a moment of missed connection/dramatic irony.
summary: Upon returning to the plaza, the protagonist sees a prisoner taken from the drifting craft: a beautiful, reddish-copper skinned woman who looks remarkably human. She makes a silent gesture toward him, pleading for help, but due to his lack of understanding of Martian customs, he fails to react. She is dragged away in dejection and contempt.
emotional_arc: Curiosity $\rightarrow$ Intense Connection $\rightarrow$ Guilt/Regret (due to inaction).
production_intent: Establish the existence of a human-like Martian species through a high-stakes visual encounter. The scene relies on the contrast between the reddish-copper skin of the captive and the green skin of the guards to communicate biological distinction without dialogue.
scene_short_description: A protagonist observes a reddish-skinned woman being forcibly removed from a drifting craft by green guards.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: Individual human connection vs. alien military force.

# Scene Contract: CH008_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the existence of a human-like Martian species through a high-stakes visual encounter. The scene relies on the contrast between the reddish-copper skin of the captive and the green skin of the guards to communicate biological distinction without dialogue.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- captive_woman (Reddish-copper skinned)
- green_martian_warriors
- sola

## Required Environments
- deserted_martian_city_plaza

## Continuity Constraints
- Skin tone: Reddish-copper for captive_woman vs Green for green_martian_warriors.
- Gesture: Specific, repeatable silent pleading motion.

## Beat List
- BT001: Discovery of the prisoner (Curiosity)
- BT002: The Silent Plea (Intense Connection)
- BT003: The Missed Connection (Guilt/Regret)

purpose: Introduce the political tension and Dejah Thoris's character through her plea for peace.
summary: Carter observes a trial in the Thark audience chamber. Dejah Thoris defends the Heliumites, arguing for their role in maintaining the atmosphere and pleading for amity. Her words momentarily sway the council, including Tars Tarkas.
emotional_arc: From political tension to a moment of profound, fragile empathy.
production_intent: Establish the political weight of the Thark trial and define Dejah Thoris as a character of diplomatic strength. The scene must transition from the cold, intimidating atmosphere of a judgment to a moment of shared emotional resonance between the prisoner and the council.

scene_primary_scale_story_point: The scale of the Thark Council towers over the lone, captive Dejah Thoris.
scene_start_state: John Carter observes the trial from a distance within the chamber.
scene_end_state: A momentary silence of empathy settles over the council members.
dominant_action_line: Dejah Thoris delivers a plea for amity and atmospheric maintenance.

# Scene Contract: CH011_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from the harsh exterior world to a high-status, opulent interior setting. Use the architectural grandeur of the ancient quarters to frame a moment of profound character vulnerability where Carter reveals his Earthly origins.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- dejah_thoris
- sola

## Required Environments
- ancient_opulent_quarters

## Continuity Constraints
- Transition from harsh exterior lighting to soft, luxurious interior lighting
- Character placement within the new quarters relative to the plaza view

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the new quarters
- BT002: Moment of relief and intimacy
- BT003: The revelation of Earth

# Scene Contract: CH011_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the disruption of a peaceful domestic moment within the luxury quarters through an external summons. The scene must pivot from the intimacy established in previous beats to a state of sudden political obligation and tension.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Messenger (implied/off-screen)
- lorquas_ptomel (mentioned)

## Required Environments
- ancient_opulent_quarters

## Continuity Constraints
- Timing of summons must immediately follow the conclusion of SC002 conversation.

## Beat List
- BT001: Quiet moment in the quarters.
- BT002: The summons arrives from Lorquas Ptomel.

purpose: To establish the political tension and the precarious status of John Carter within Tharkian society.
summary: John Carter is summoned to an audience with Lorquas Ptomel. Ptomel confronts him regarding his ambiguous position, accuses him of plotting escape with a red prisoner, and issues a stern warning: while the Tharks are just, Carter may be killed in self-defense or during an escape attempt. He demands the delivery of Dejah Thoris to Tal Hajus.
emotional_arc: From wary respect to mounting political pressure and threat.
production_intent: Establish the political instability of john_carter by placing him in a high-stakes confrontation with lorquas_ptomel. The scene must emphasize the power imbalance and the threat of violence inherent in Tharkian law to define Carter's precarious social standing.

scene_end_state: Carter is left under the weight of an ultimatum and a direct threat to his life.
dominant_action_line: Ptomel interrogates Carter's loyalty and issues a demand for Dejah Thoris.

# Scene Contract: CH012_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the physical transition of john_carter from a prisoner to a chieftain by securing permanent quarters. The scene must visually demonstrate his tactical decision-making through spatial selection within carters_quarters_building, prioritizing proximity to Dejah Thoris via floor height.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas

## Required Environments
- thark_city_plaza
- carters_quarters_building (Interior/Stairs/Third Floor)

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise selection of the third floor level.
- Visual alignment between the window view and prisoner locations.

## Beat List
- BT001: Approach the building in the plaza.
- BT002: Ascend through the building levels.
- BT003: Select the third floor room and survey the tactical view.

# Scene Contract: CH013_SC001

## Production Intent
Demonstrate John Carter's specialized skill of mastering Martian beasts through empathy and authority rather than brute force. The sequence must visually transition from aggressive, wild animal behavior to calm, docile cooperation to validate his unique methodology.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas
- green_martian_warriors

## Required Environments
- green_martian_city_complex (training_arena, warrior_observation_deck)

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical behavior shift of thoats from wild to docile
- Carter's training attire consistency
- Specific hand/body movements used in taming process

## Beat List
- BT001: Chaos of the wild thoats
- BT002: The taming process (empathy vs force)
- BT003: Teaching the warriors and Tars Tarkas

purpose: To mark the transition of the community and reward Carter for his contributions.
summary: After seven days, the community prepares to march toward Thark. Lorquas Ptomel rewards Carter with a gold anklet in recognition of his success with the mounts.

## Production Intent
Execute a high-stakes sword duel between Carter and Zad within the bright Martian plains, culminating in a tactical betrayal where Sarkoja uses a mirror to blind Carter.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- zad
- sarkoja

- duel_arena_open_plains

## Continuity Constraints
- Sun angle relative to camera and actors
- Position of the mirror and reflection trajectory
- Sword positions during the strike

## Beat List
- BT001: The duel begins between Carter and Zad.
- BT002: Sarkoja prepares the betrayal via mirror.
- BT003: The blinding light hits Carter, causing disorientation.

purpose: Resolve the action with a tragic consequence and a cliffhanger.

# Scene Contract: CH018_SC002

## Production Intent
Execute a violent power shift through a primal hand-to-hand duel between two leaders on the Martian plains. The sequence must transition from high tension to chaotic violence, concluding with a definitive kill and a change in leadership status.

## Required Cast
- dak_kova (ferocious, green-skinned, scarred physique)
- bar_comas
- Warhoon Warriors (spectators/horde)

## Required Environments
- martian_plains_march_route (open plains near the Warhoon column)

## Continuity Constraints
- Blood splatter patterns on terrain and characters
- Final positioning of the fallen Bar Comas
- Dak Kova's physical state (scars, sweat, blood) post-combat

## Beat List
- BT001: Dak Kova defies Bar Comas.
- BT002: Primal, savage hand-to-hand duel.
- BT003: Dak Kova kills Bar Comas with a tusk thrust and claims the title of Jeddak.

# Scene Contract: CH018_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the massive scale of ten thousand Warhoon warriors moving across the Martian plains. The sequence must visually communicate a sense of unstoppable momentum as the horde transitions from the open plains toward the city and eventually into the subterranean darkness.

## Required Cast
- dak_kova (Green-skinned, scarred, primal intensity)
- Warhoon Warriors (Massed horde)

## Required Environments
- martian_plains_march_route (Open Martian plains)
- warhoon_subterranean_dungeon (Pitch-black subterranean dungeon within the city of Warhoon)

## Continuity Constraints
- Direction of travel must remain consistent toward the city.
- Lighting must transition from open/diffuse Martian light to pitch-black subterranean darkness.

## Beat List
- BT001: The massive horde begins their retreat across the plains.
- BT002: The march gains momentum under Dak Kova's leadership.
- BT003: The horde transitions into the city and dungeon.

# Scene Contract: CH018_SC004

## Production Intent
Depict the psychological collapse of a highly fit combatant through prolonged sensory deprivation and isolation in total darkness. The visual language must rely on minimal light catching facial features to emphasize physical deterioration and mental instability.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter, transitioning from clothed/fit to naked/emaciated)

## Required Environments
- subterranean_dungeon (pitch black)

## Continuity Constraints
- Protagonist weight loss progression
- Protagonist hair growth and unkemptness
- Transition from clothed combatant to naked state

## Beat List
- BT001: Initial terror of confinement
- BT002: Prolonged isolation and physical decline
- BT003: Psychological break into near-madness

summary: Driven by madness, the protagonist ambushes his food deliverer with a heavy chain, killing him. He finds the jailer's keys but is immediately confronted by glowing eyes in the dark.
production_intent: Execute a high-tension transition from isolation to violent outburst followed by sudden primal terror. The sequence must utilize rapid cutting during the physical struggle and absolute stillness for the final reveal of the unseen threat.

Execute a high-tension transition from isolation to violent outburst followed by sudden primal terror. The sequence must utilize rapid cutting during the physical struggle and absolute stillness for the final reveal of the unseen threat.

- BT002: Violent ambush and killing
- BT003: Discovery of keys and confrontation with eyes

# Scene Contract: CH019_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the scale of the Warhoon gladiatorial culture through a high-spectacle tournament sequence. The scene must transition from the claustrophobic dread of imprisonment to the kinetic adrenaline of combat, emphasizing John Carter's physical dominance and the massive subterranean architecture.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- kantos_kan
- warhoon_horde
- various_beasts

## Required Environments
- subterranean_amphitheater_arena

## Continuity Constraints
- Blood/wound placement on john_carter
- Weapon handling consistency
- Crowd noise levels scaling with combat intensity

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival and Dread (Prisoners enter arena)
- BT002: Human Combat Escalation (Carter vs Men)
- BT003: Beast Combat Spectacle (Carter vs Beasts)
- BT004: Triumph and Crowd Reaction (Victory/Adrenaline)

purpose: Climax of the arena arc and execution of the escape plan.
summary: Kantos Kan defeats a massive sixteen-foot warrior. Carter and Kan then execute a pre-planned "staged death" duel where Kan appears to kill Carter, allowing them to manipulate the outcome of the games.
production_intent: Execute a high-stakes combat sequence transitioning into a choreographed deception. The fight must establish the physical dominance of Kantos Kan over a massive opponent before pivoting to a controlled, staged duel between Carter and Kan that manipulates the Warhoon crowd through simulated lethality.
scene_short_description: A massive warrior falls before a staged execution in a subterranean arena.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: Sixteen-foot warrior vs human-sized combatants.
scene_start_state: Kantos Kan engages the massive green warrior in active combat.
scene_end_state: Carter lies seemingly dead as Kan stands over him, deceiving the crowd.
dominant_action_line: Combat victory followed by a pre-planned staged death duel.
scene_spatial_layout: Central fighting pit surrounded by tiered spectator seating
Open floor space for large-scale movement

# Scene Contract: CH019_SC004

## Production Intent
Execute a high-stakes combat sequence transitioning into a choreographed deception. The fight must establish the physical dominance of Kantos Kan over a massive opponent before pivoting to a controlled, staged duel between Carter and Kan that manipulates the Warhoon crowd through simulated lethality.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- kantos_kan
- Massive Green Warrior
- warhoon_horde

## Required Environments
- subterranean_amphitheater_arena

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact trajectory of the killing blow (BT001 vs BT003)
- Distinction between real blood splatter and fake blood splatter
- Weapon states (damage/positioning) during transition from combat to duel

## Beat List
- BT001: Kantos Kan defeats the massive green warrior.
- BT002: Carter and Kan coordinate the deception via conspiratorial looks.
- BT003: The staged death duel occurs, resulting in Carter's apparent death.

Execute a high-intensity combat sequence demonstrating John Carter's physical superiority through a prolonged engagement against four Zodangan guardsmen. The choreography must transition from frantic desperation to calculated violence, concluding with the total neutralization of all threats within the palace corridors.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- Four Guardsmen

## Required Environments
- zodanga_palace_interior (Antechamber/Corridors)

## Continuity Constraints
- Blood splatter patterns on walls and floor
- Weapon positions post-combat
- Cumulative count of dead guards in frame

## Beat List
- BT001: Confrontation and interception
- BT002: The violent battle
- BT003: Aftermath and exhaustion

purpose: To provide the emotional climax and establish the tragic social barriers preventing the protagonists' union.
summary: Carter finds Dejah Thoris. Though she recognizes him and loves him, she explains that Barsoomian custom makes her vow to Sab Than binding. She informs him that he cannot marry her while Sab lives, nor can he wed a man who kills her husband.
production_intent: Establish the insurmountable social and legal barriers between the protagonists through a high-stakes emotional confrontation in a private palace setting. The scene must transition from the physical intensity of recent combat to the heavy, static weight of tragic realization.
scene_short_description: A wounded man finds a woman in a private palace corridor, only to be met with tragic news.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: The individual desire of the protagonists is crushed by the weight of Barsoomian custom and law.
scene_start_state: john_carter enters with high urgency, physically marked by combat.
scene_end_state: A heavy, static silence of resignation between the two characters.
dominant_action_line: The confrontation shifts from a desperate reunion to a realization of legal impossibility.
scene_spatial_layout: Narrow corridor proximity forcing close physical interaction

# Scene Contract: CH022_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the insurmountable social and legal barriers between the protagonists through a high-stakes emotional confrontation in a private palace setting. The scene must transition from the physical intensity of recent combat to the heavy, static weight of tragic realization.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Physical: sweat/blood)
- dejah_thoris (Emotional: tears/makeup)

- zodanga_palace_interior (Private corridors and antechamber area)

- Dejah Thoris must maintain tearful makeup state.

## Beat List

- BT002: Recognition and emotional connection between the two.
- BT003: The tragic revelation of Barsoomian custom preventing their union.

- Thark armor and gear consistency

- BT002: Movement into gardens
- BT003: Aggressive charge toward ceremony

- BT003: Decisive Destruction

# Scene Contract: CH028_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the protagonist's physical and mental disorientation upon returning to Earth. The visual language must emphasize a sense of claustrophobia and decay through high-contrast lighting and macro textures of disintegrating Martian garments.

## Required Cast
- john_carter

## Required Environments
- arizona_cave_system

## Continuity Constraints
- Cumulative degradation of decaying garments per movement
- Shifting lighting levels relative to character movement through cave

## Beat List
- BT001: Awakening from darkness
- BT002: Physical disorientation and breathing
- BT003: Movement and garment decay

# Scene Contract: CH028_SC004

## Production Intent
Use a montage to visually communicate a twenty-year temporal jump, transitioning the protagonist from survival mode to a state of wealthy but isolated stagnation. The sequence must contrast material abundance with emotional emptiness.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Aged, 20 years older than previous appearance)

## Required Environments
- Arizona mine site (untouched mine)
- Hudson River study (wealthy/luxury aesthetic)

## Continuity Constraints
- Age progression of john_carter must be clearly visible via facial features.
- Wealthy aesthetic (clothing/study decor) must remain consistent throughout the second half of the montage.

## Beat List
- BT001: Temporal jump and wealth accumulation (Arizona mine context).
- BT002: Transition to sedentary wealth (Hudson River study possessions).
- BT003: Emotional stagnation and longing (Close-up on aged john_carter).
